reference: IN AN INSTANT THE SCHOOLMASTER WITH A LEAP RESEMBLING IN STRENGTH AND AGILITY THE SPRING OF A TIGER SEIZED SEYTON WITH ONE HAND BY THE THROAT AND EXCLAIMED YOUR MONEY OR I WILL FLING YOU INTO THIS HOLE
text: In an instant, the schoolmaster, with a leap resembling in strength and agility the spring of a tiger, seized Seaton with one hand by the throat and exclaimed, "Your money, or I will fling you into this hole!"
